name: Netflix Methods
description: Learn Netflix access techniques like EM, C2P, and privatization.
long_description:
🛠️ Netflix Methods:
- Netflix C2P: Change the owner's email to your own.
- Netflix EM: Receive an invite without accessing the owner's email.
- Manual Privatize: Transform public Netflix cookies into private ones.
price:
- Netflix C2P: $3
- Netflix EM: $1
- Manual Privatize: $1.5
requirements:
✅ Basic familiarity with Netflix cookies.
✅ For C2P you must have third party cookies, on cc based you can perform but hard same way as tp.

name: GPT Invite Trick
description: Gain GPT+ access through invite-based methods.
long_description:
🧠 GPT Invite Trick:
- Receive an invite directly to your email.
- Works on a luck-based system.
- Fully automated delivery.
- Similar to Netflix lifetime methods.
requirements:
✅ Basic email account to receive invites.
✅ Results may vary (luck-based).

name: Spotify Methods
description: Master Spotify invitation and account conversion techniques.
long_description:
🎵 Spotify Methods:
- Mail Invite: Receive a Spotify invite in your email.
- C2P: Convert the account from the owner's email to your own.
requirements:

name: Hotstar Method
description: Convert Hotstar accounts to your own using simple techniques.
long_description:
📺 Hotstar Method:
- C2P: Change the account from the owner’s email to your mobile number.
requirements:
